title: Hut 8 Corp (HUT) Analyst Ratings Summary
text: Hut 8 Corp Analyst Ratings: Consensus Rating: Buy. Price Targets: Consensus $82.80, Highest $156.00 (Jefferies), Lowest $20.00 (Northland Capital Markets). Current Price: $102.47 (as of May 15). Analyst Coverage: 20 analysts with 99 total ratings. Recent Rating Activity: Jefferies (May 14, 2026) initiated with $156 target, implying 52.24% upside. B. Riley Securities (May 13, 2026) raised target from $76 to $130 (26.87% upside). Rosenblatt (May 8, 2026) raised target from $89 to $124 (21.01% upside). These three firms average a $136.67 price target, suggesting 33.37% implied upside from current levels. Sentiment Overview: Analyst community maintains bullish stance with majority of ratings classified as Buy. Most recent analyst actions reflect price target increases rather than downgrades, indicating strengthening conviction among Wall Street professionals covering the cryptocurrency mining company.
